name: Alteration
tagline: Reshape your own body or another's into new forms.

baseAbility.name: Shapeshift
baseAbility.description: Standard action, touch (or self). Change a creature's basic body (a transformation) and add traits (1 + 1 per 5 CL) on top of it. Unwilling targets get a Fortitude save and cost 1 SP. Lasts while you concentrate; spend 1 SP to sustain it for 1 min/CL without concentrating. The Blank Transformation (free, granted the moment you gain this sphere) adds traits without changing the target's basic body at all.

talents.name: Additional Limbs
talents.description: Grant extra arms, a tail, extra legs, or an extra head as traits, each with minor mechanical perks (e.g. an extra head guards against flanking or enchantment).

talents.name: Agile
talents.description: Trait options granting +2 dodge AC, evasion, +4 initiative, or uncanny dodge.

talents.name: Bestial Reflexes
talents.description: Trait options granting reach attacks, a leaping strike, pounce (1 SP), or a trample attack.

talents.name: Greater Changes
talents.description: +1 trait you can apply with your shapeshift. Stacks with Extreme Changes (advanced).

talents.name: Instill Shapeshift
talents.description: Bottle a shapeshift into a potion-like liquid that anyone can use later.

talents.name: Lingering Transformation
talents.description: Shapeshift lingers 2 extra rounds after you stop concentrating; the 1-SP sustained duration jumps to 10 min/CL (or 1 hr/CL in some cases).

talents.name: Mass Alteration
talents.description: Shapeshift 1 extra creature per 2 CL (min 1) at once, all with the same form and traits.

talents.name: Perfect Imitation
talents.description: Shapeshift can copy the appearance of a specific familiar individual, not just a generic race/species.

talents.name: Powerful Limbs
talents.description: Trait options for wielding larger weapons, upsized natural weapon damage, or better jumping/carrying capacity.

talents.name: Ranged Alteration
talents.description: Shapeshift works at close range instead of touch. Repeatable to extend range further.

talents.name: Size Change
talents.description: Add a trait that changes the target's size by 1 category (more at higher CL), adjusting Str/Dex and combat stats accordingly.

talents.name: Swarm Shape
talents.description: Turn the target into a swarm of Tiny creatures with damaging presence, increasing resistance to crits, but unable to perform combat maneuvers.

talents.name: Twisted Shapeshift
talents.description: Make the shapeshift itself deal damage on a failed save, plus grim optional traits like sealing eyes shut or silencing the target.

talents.name: Vitality
talents.description: Trait options granting fast healing (1 SP), a bonus vs. death/poison/disease effects, or immunity to magical sleep.

transformationTalents.name: Animalistic Transformation
transformationTalents.description: Grants a land-beast body: 4 legs, bite attack, scent, bonus land speed and natural armor.

transformationTalents.name: Anthropomorphic Transformation
transformationTalents.description: Grants a humanoid body: hands, speech, and the option to keep some of the target's old natural gear as a hybrid form.

transformationTalents.name: Aquan Transformation
transformationTalents.description: Grants an aquatic body: swim speed, bite attack, darkvision, and the ability to breathe water.

transformationTalents.name: Avian Transformation
transformationTalents.description: Grants a flying body: wings, a glide/fly speed that improves with caster level, and talon attacks.

transformationTalents.name: Dragon Transformation
transformationTalents.description: Grants a draconic body with a chosen-element breath weapon, bite attack, and usable hands.

transformationTalents.name: Plant Transformation
transformationTalents.description: Grants a plant body: slam attacks, heavy natural armor, and the plant creature type for targeting purposes.

transformationTalents.name: Serpentine Transformation
transformationTalents.description: Grants a snake body with a bite attack, and a themed package (constricting or poisonous).

transformationTalents.name: Vermin Transformation
transformationTalents.description: Grants an insect/arachnid body with many legs, a climb speed, and optional poison or web attacks.

bodyTalents.name: Outsider Body
bodyTalents.description: Grants an alignment subtype (chaotic/lawful/good/evil) plus matching damage reduction and, at higher tiers, a themed supernatural perk.

bodyTalents.name: Undead Body
bodyTalents.description: Makes the target react to positive/negative energy like undead, and grants scaling resistances, damage reduction, and (at higher CL) blood drain or a fear aura.
